title: The Valentine Gift
content: On Valentine's Day, Claire expected nothing more than a quiet evening at home. When she opened her front door, she found a small gift box with her name on it. Inside was a bracelet with a tiny heart charm and a note that said, “Thank you for making every day brighter.” She immediately knew it was from Ethan. She called him, and he invited her for a walk through the city lights. It became the sweetest Valentine's Day either of them had ever shared.
